TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cu_ki_ngo, title = Cu_ki_ngo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cu_ki_ngo} }

S.FORM: alang Cu ki ngo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 337 buwan, 843 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 134 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 709 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cu ki ngo hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Himoti. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cu ki ngo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cu ki ngo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 337 buwan, 843 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 134 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 709 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Bunun 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cu ki ngo hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'llaw na Cu ki ngo hya' ga Himoti. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cu ki ngo ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤unun *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipuruŇčan. taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo ńßja Ē …£a ńßimoti. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
